instruction: Return only Rust code. Include use std::collections::HashMap. Define Account and Transfer structs, a LedgerError enum, and pub fn stage_ledger_transfer(accounts: &mut HashMap<String, Account>, fees: &mut u64, transfer: &Transfer) -> Result<(), LedgerError>. Use a cloned map, checked_add, and checked_sub. Commit accounts and fees only after every check succeeds.

Return only Rust code. Include use std::collections::HashMap. Define Account and Transaction structs, a LedgerError enum, and pub fn apply_checked_transaction(accounts: &mut HashMap<String, Account>, fee_sink: &mut u64, tx: &Transaction) -> Result<(), LedgerError>. Do not use +=, -=, or or_default. Use checked arithmetic and write formatted Rust that passes cargo fmt.
